description_long: This is a modern, boxy two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The front features a small porch area, a driveway, and a green lawn with a tree, while the facade is punctuated by large windows and a balcony above the entryway. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored with some sections in pink and dark gray, and the rear of the house includes a large wooden gate and additional windows. The side views reveal a simple, unadorned wall with a single door and a recessed upper section, as well as a fenced area and more greenery. The roof is flat with a central skylight or open section, and the overall structure is geometric and clean-lined. The house is surrounded by paved and grassy areas, suggesting a suburban or urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a balcony, and a mix of light, pink, and dark gray exterior walls, set amid paved and grassy areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, porch, balcony, and a green lawn with a tree.
description_view_1: Side view with a plain wall, a single door, and a glimpse of the recessed upper section and greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a large wooden gate, pink side walls, and upper-level windows and balcony.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with dark walls, several windows, and a clear view of the paved and grassy front area with a tree.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and a balcony above; minimalistic with no columns or overhangs.
